input.prompt: Create a summary of the project architecture and save it as a text file in my Downloads/shinobu directory.
Create a summary of the project architecture and save it as a text file in my Downloads/shinobu directory.

subtasks.title: Read project architecture information
subtasks.description: Access and read the source material containing details of the project architecture to be summarized.

subtasks.title: Summarize project architecture
subtasks.description: Extract key components, structure, and relationships from the architecture information into a concise summary.

subtasks.title: Create text file with summary
subtasks.description: Save the generated summary as a text file named 'summary.txt' in the directory '~/Downloads/shinobu/'.
